html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Varg

Lucky Whistles can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nuggets at the Varg Shrine. Blowing the whistle will tame nearby Hounds (including Clay Hounds), but not Horror Hounds, for 40 seconds. Tamed Hounds will follow the player around, but will not attack them. However, they will still attack other Mobs as they normally would. A player can only have five Hounds tamed at a time. The Lucky Whistle can be used ten times.

Gallery

  • A promotional image for the event posted by Klei Entertainment on February 9, 2018.
  • Five Hounds tamed with a Lucky Whistle.
  • Concept art for the Varg Shrine and Lucky Whistle from Rhymes with Play # 179.

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Year of the Varg
“This'd stop a dog in its tracks.”
–Wilson
“Heh heh. STAY.”
–Willow
“Tiny whistle stick makes no noise!”
–Wolfgang
“That I cannot hear it does not mean it is silent.”
–Wendy
“ERROR: FREQUENCY OUT OF RANGE”
–WX-78
“It emits a frequency undetectable to the human ear.”
–Wickerbottom
“I usually do my own animal calls.”
–Woodie
“Howl I ever find a use for this?”
–Maxwell
“It casts a spell upön the dögged beasts.”
–Wigfrid
“Our head buzzes when we blow it.”
–Webber
“I think I'm too old to hear it.”
–Warly
“Tweet Tweet for Woofer”
–Wormwood
“This oughta give them paws pause.”
–Winona
“Ooo, ouch! My ears!”
–Wortox
“It make no sound?”
–Wurt
“Woby doesn't like the sound of it.”
–Walter
“It might be useful if I ever need to train some unruly dogs.”
–Wanda
Lucky Whistles can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nuggets at the Varg Shrine. Blowing the whistle will tame nearby Hounds (including Clay Hounds), but not Horror Hounds, for 40 seconds. Tamed Hounds will follow the player around, but will not attack them. However, they will still attack other Mobs as they normally would. A player can only have five Hounds tamed at a time. The Lucky Whistle can be used ten times.

'''Lucky Whistles''' can be acquired in exchange for 3 Lucky Gold Nuggets at the Varg Shrine. Blowing the whistle will tame nearby [[Hound]]s (including Clay Hounds), but not [[Horror Hound|Horror Hounds]], for 40 seconds. Tamed Hounds will follow the player around, but will not attack them. However, they will still attack other [[Mobs]] as they normally would. A player can only have five Hounds tamed at a time. The Lucky Whistle can be used ten times.
